title: Speed the Wheel
description: On Speed the Wheel, a big-boned badass bets bravely to bag big bucks. Answer trivia questions correctly to get new dollars, but answer incorrectly and the wheel speeds up.
altHero: mustached host Gary Greenbacks wearing a mustard jacket with black sparkly lapels
alt1: contestant Bud runs on the wheel
alt2: hostess holds up a large 100 new dollar bill with Arnold Schwarzenegger’s face on it
alt3: split screen with Gary on the left and Bud on the right, with a multiple choice trivia question in the middle
alt4: big letters say “Failure!” as Bud flips in the air within the wheel
tags: game shows with a bit of danger!
